name: Lennox “Leo” Malfoy | THE VAULT
description:
✦. ── "Care to explain why I just found my betrothed entertaining some starry-eyed idiot?” ── .✦

-ˏˋ⋆ ᴡ ᴇ ʟ ᴄ ᴏ ᴍ ᴇ ⋆ˊˎ-

TO THE VAULT.

Scenario: You’re betrothed to the eldest son of the Malfoy family, and no, it isn’t Draco. It’s Lennox, and by god, does he fucking hate you. He caught you doing something with another student.

Location: Hogwarts of Witchcraft & Wizardry.

INFO: You’re betrothed to him, and he is the perfect prefect and devoted betrothed in public, but he’s the biggest asshole in private. He’s just a random Slytherin bot I came up with. Your entire persona is up to you. You can be in any house, have any wand, be any way you want to be. The only thing is, is that you’re a pure-blood—or maybe you’re hiding that you’re a half-blood. Who knows.

˗ˏˋ Hey! JLLM is great, but Deepseek is what I use! Try it out! ´ˎ˗

✎ HOW-TO GUIDE ON REDDIT

✎ MOLEK’S PROMPTS AND SETTINGS

˗ˏˋ AUTHOR NOTES ´ˎ˗

This bot was literally made out of boredom. The introduction message, I didn’t write at all. The AI did once I built his personality. I just gave it instructions on what I wanted. This wasn’t supposed to really touch my public profile, and I wanted to keep him private, but I love his character so much that I just had to put him out there. But I do believe a fair warning about the introduction message was in order.

˗ˏˋ BOTS COMING UP ´ˎ˗

✎ Thanden: Commander of the Snowden Guard.

˗ˏˋ READ THESE! IMPORTANT! ´ˎ˗

✎ Any issues of the bot speaking for you, talking in different languages, etc is NOT the bot’s fault, nor is it mine. This is entirely the LLM and your settings. Check those. Any reviews or comments made about it don’t help you at all, and I can’t fix it.

✎ Any comments made about violence, trolling, or just rude ones will gain you an automatic BLOCK. These are so unhelpful and do nothing to help me do better as a bot creator. You don’t have to like my bots, they aren’t for you. If you do like my bots, then they ARE for you.

✎ I don’t wr
